_EventToExposeStructInABI__Params((uint2.notice: External event used to help client-side tooling encode parameters.

userdoc.notice: DripCheck that checks if specific secrets exist (or not). Supports having a secret that         must exist for the check to pass as well as a second secret that must not exist. First         secret can be revealed to begin the drip, second secret can be revealed to stop it.

params._params: Encoded parameters for the drip check.

returns.execute_: Whether the drip should be executed.
